		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_chukchi_pantheism_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = antinomian }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_antinomian_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = aten }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_aten_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = batembuzi }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_batembuzi_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = bud_bahusrutiya }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_bud_bahusrutiya_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = bud_mahayana }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_bud_mahayana_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = dionysos }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_dionysos_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = donatist }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_donatist_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = druze }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_druze_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = erlik }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_erlik_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = hubal }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_hubal_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = illuyanka }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_illuyanka_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = irminsul }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_irminsul_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = jud_sabaoth }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_jud_sabaoth_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = mand_ruha }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_mand_ruha_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = mani_ahriman }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_mani_ahriman_religion }

		limit = { religion = melkite }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_melkite_religion }

		limit = { religion = montanist }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_montanist_religion }
	}

	else_if = {

		limit = { religion = makonde_pagan }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_makonde_pagan_religion }

	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = mwari }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_mwari_religion }

	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = muzimu_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_muzimu_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = muzimu }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_muzimu_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = okuruo_reformed }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_okuruo_reformed_religion }
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { religion = okuruo }
		new_bloodline = { set_bloodline_flag = requires_okuruo_religion }
	}
}
